Upcoming events

Certificate Course in Forensic Nursing (CCFN)

Certificate Course in Forensic Nursing on 17 June to 3 July 2024 Organized by: Global Foundation for Nursing Profession & Social Services Jaipur, Rajasthan in Collaboration with Faculty of Nursing, Rama University, Kanpur. Venue: Online Via ZOOM. Time: 02:00 pm to 4:00 pm, Email: gfnpss@gmail.com Website- www.gfnpss.org

Contact Us

Who We Are

GFNPSS is a non-governmental organization that works for the advancement of the nursing profession & social welfare. The organization has established in 2017. .
